title: The Chu-Beasley Optimization Algorithm Flowchart
description: A visual representation of the iterative optimization process for solving complex problems, likely referencing a genetic or evolutionary algorithm proposed by E. Chu.
relationships: The process flows sequentially from initial generation through fitness evaluation, selection, crossover, mutation, and new population formation, creating a loop that repeats until the termination condition is met, indicating the solution has been optimized.
